message:
fix(sanitize): Extend ReDoS protection to pre-compiled RegExp objects

Previously, ReDoS pattern validation only applied to string patterns in
compileExtraPatterns(). This fix extends the same safety checks to
pre-compiled RegExp objects:

- Check source length (>256 chars rejected)
- Detect nested quantifiers like (.+)+ that cause catastrophic backtracking

This prevents malicious or poorly-written RegExp objects from being used
to cause denial of service attacks via exponential regex matching.

Added tests:
- Pre-compiled RegExp with ReDoS patterns are rejected
- Pre-compiled RegExp with overly long source are rejected
- Safe pre-compiled RegExp objects pass through unchanged

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
